description: Maps the 'This week in numbers' box to goals — not generic stats.

priorityGoal.label: PM Life
priorityGoal.detailOnTarget: Solid time on the calendar for job search, brand & PM work (incl. Button School).
priorityGoal.detailCelebrate: You went over your PM Life target this week — well done. That focus is showing up.
priorityGoal.detailThin: Light week for PM Life — your main season focus.
priorityGoal.detailStrong: Strong PM Life week — meetings and blocks showing up.

onTarget.label: Meals
onTarget.detailOnTarget: Eating rhythm looks roughly on your ~14h/week band (blocked time).

onTarget.label: Pet care: Lua
onTarget.detailOnTarget: Lua time on the calendar (banana 🟡 blocks).
onTarget.detailWhenLight: No banana blocks this week — label Lua walks as paseo/lua or yellow; walks can count as 🐕 + 🏃.

onTarget.label: Self-care
onTarget.detailOnTarget: Body care showed up — showers, skin/hair.

gentleNudge.label: Exercise
gentleNudge.detailNudge: Sage green blocks — pilates, yoga, GAP, walks. Walks with Lua count as pet care too. Only blocked time shows here.

gentleNudge.label: DJing & music
gentleNudge.detailNudge: Paid creative path — worth protecting prep & gig time.

alerts.label: Radio Life
alerts.detailAlert: Radio (community radio) is using a lot of your scheduled week — notice if it crowded PM Life.
